creator: haraldei-freebsdbugz@anduin.net
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #11)

Complete logs from jsvc with `-debug` flag, and output from truss here:
https://yme.volse.net/s/obx67iBW74FQ2c4

(Too bit to attach.)

Included the script used to launch jsvc (a modified version of the rc script for tomcat) as well.

Not sure if this tells anything really useful, though. libjvm.so is found and loaded as it should.

The crash happens in compiled java code, so I'm suspecting that something in the jsvc process interferes with the compiler or the code cache in one way or another.
